title: Because Your Voice Was At My Side
content:
Because your voice was at my side
    I gave him pain,
    Because within my hand I held
    Your hand again.

    There is no word nor any sign
    Can make amend,
    He is a stranger to me now
    Who was my friend.
meaning:
"Because Your Voice Was At My Side" is a quintessential example of James Joyce's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
